characters.design_prompt: A steady, plain-spoken human knight in his thirties: warm baritone, unhurried and reassuring, the voice of someone used to being the calm wall others stand behind. Dependable, a little weary, never boastful.
A bright, quick halfling burglar: light, cheerful, fast-talking with a mischievous lilt and a grin you can hear. Allergic to fair fights and delighted by her own cleverness.
A cool, precise elf mage: clear, slightly aloof alto with crisp diction and an undercurrent of impatience, as if explaining the obvious to slower minds. Elegant, brilliant, faintly arrogant.
A gruff dwarf smith and defender: low, gravelly, blunt contralto with a rolling burr. Dry humor, zero patience for nonsense, and a habit of grumbling about the quality of human steel.

A deep, rough orc warrior: powerful bass with a controlled rumble that turns to a feral roar in the berserk rage. Quiet and scrupulously fair when calm, terrifying when not - a gentle giant tired of being feared.

A warm, composed human cleric: gentle, steady mezzo with a note of quiet conviction. Kind but not naive, carrying the measured calm of someone who heals on the front line and is starting to doubt her superiors.
